title: Duels
description: Duels by ZDev is a modern plugin for Minecraft 1.20.1 (Paper) that allows players to arrange 1—on-1 duels with a choice of maps and whales
body:
**Duels — A dueling plugin for Minecraft 1.20.1**
**
Duels is a modern and flexible plug-in for Minecraft Paper servers that allows players to arrange honest 1-on-1 duels with a choice of cards and sets (whales).**

**The plugin is ideal for PvP servers, arenas, mini-games, and any projects where honest and entertaining fights between players are important.**

**What does this plugin add?**

The 1-on-1 duel system:
Allows players to challenge each other to a duel with a choice of a set of items and a map.

Flexible kit system:
Administrators can create, edit, and delete whales directly in the game. Whales are pre—prepared sets of items for dueling.

The arena (map) system:
You can create an unlimited number of arenas, set up spawn points for each player, and delete and edit maps.

Duel Timer:
An automatic draw if the duel is not completed within the set time.

Automatic teleportation:
Players move to the arena and come back after a duel.

Duel statistics:
Wins, losses, draws

Integration with Placeholder API:
Use placeholders to display statistics and tops in tab, chat, scoreboard and other plugins.

Convenient commands with auto-completion:
All teams are equipped with auto-stories for players and admins.

**Main functions:**

Challenge a player to a duel with a choice of set and card:
/duel challenge <player> <set> <map>
Acceptance and rejection of a duel:
/duel accept, /duel decline
View active duels:
/duel list
Creating, editing, and deleting sets (whales):
/duel kit create <name>, /duel kit edit <name>, /duel kit save, /duel kit delete <name>
Creating and configuring arenas:
/duel map create <name>, /duel map setspawn <name> <1/2>, /duel map delete <name>
Automatic messages about the start, victory, draw and cancellation of the duel (can be configured in config.yml)

**A simple and intuitive config for configuring all parameters**

**Why choose this particular plugin?**

Maximum flexibility:
Unlimited number of arenas and sets, everything is set up right in the game.

Honest duels:
Each player gets the same conditions, excluding any advantages.

Easy integration:
The plugin does not require complex configuration, works out of the box and is compatible with PlaceholderAPI.

Statistics and tops:
Motivation for players is to compete for a place in the top duelists!

Support and development:
The plugin is actively maintained and developed, and improvements are possible to meet your needs.
